feedback.text: Hey, Please go ahead and protect us, consumers from game developer companies destroying videogames. Its sad, that this is not automatically granted. If I paid for a videogame, the access to that videogame should not be revoked ever. Its okay, if the game developers dont support that game anymore, if they dont provide updates anymore, but me as a user should be able to keep playing that game if I want, once again, I PAID FOR IT. Thanks. Just a user from EU.
